title: The Idea
description: iERP was founded in a small co-working space in Noida with a 5-person team and a bold vision.

title: First Launch
description: Launched v1.0 to beta users. Signed our first 50 enterprise clients within 3 months.

title: Series A
description: Raised $12M in Series A funding. Expanded team to 80+ and opened offices in Bangalore and Dubai.

title: Global Expansion
description: Crossed 300 enterprise clients across 20 countries. Launched AI-powered analytics module.

title: iERP 2.0
description: Complete platform redesign with next-gen AI, real-time collaboration, and 99.99% uptime guarantee.

title: The Future
description: 500+ clients, 30+ countries, and just getting started. Building the most intelligent ERP platform on the planet.
